title: Wyrmsteel
description: A weapon mod that includes more than just simple weapons
body:
# Wyrmsteel

This mod add new and unique weapons to Minecraft with their own enchantments. These weapons require alot of progress to unlock as it will require netherite to get Wyrmsteel Ingots which are require for every weapon. This includes a weapon core which requires 1 Nether Star per Core. This mod also comes with a custom weapon slot that allows you to wear items on your back or even by your waist.

## Currently Added Weapons

- Scythe (Decaying, Share the Love)
- Sickle (Slice and Dice, Wounding)
- Blowgun (Puncture, Junglebound, Breaching)
- Headhunter (Marksman)

## Currently added Utility

- Injections - 19 Effects & One Milk
- Totem of Healthiness - Maxes out your health, hunger and saturation at the downside of not being able to regenerate health and you will take more damage
- Infinite Enderpearl - It in its name (Coolness Factor, Synchronization)

## Enchantments added

- Decaying (Inflicts target with wither when they are hit)
- Share the Love (When Right-Clicked sends a ray that inflicts the target with the exact same status effects the attacker has)
- Slice and Dice (Has an extremly low chance to instantly kill a mob at the expense of losing its loot)
- Wounding (Reduces base damage but has a 20% chance to inflict double (original) base damage
-  Puncture (Replaces normal darts that inflicts Torpor making it impossible to regenarate health. Cannot be removed unless entity dies or drinks milk)
- Junglebound (Replaces normal darts that inflicts Poison. Cannot be removed unless entity dies or drinks milk)
- Breaching (Darts are now replaced with darts give entities Vulnerability till death or they drink milk)
- Marksman (Enables the ability to mark entities)
- Coolness Factor (When thrown it reduces the time needed to wait to throw the pearl again)
- Synchronization (When thrown it prevents you from experiencing a Dimension Desynchronization)

### Discloser

This mod may stay in the Beta state till every issue that could cause the loss of items or graphical issues. This was just meant for 1 weapon but now its up to 4. This mod is now planned to have so much more stuff. Till the graphical and syncronization issues are fixed, this mod will stay in Beta.
